utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, there are entries for: selected property (maps to property) with details and price; financing with terms; legal_services with costs; moving_services with costs; setup_services (utilities) with costs; total_budget with a cost breakdown. Each appears to be specified with necessary details: property includes title/description/price; financing includes solution type, LTV, fees, interest range, duration, documentation; legal_services include package, cost, and survey options with costs; moving_services include package and cost; setup_services include utility cost options; total_budget summarizes key costs and notes. All 6 required items are present and reasonably detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects a 'New Build Condo' priced at CAD 480K, which corresponds to 'New Build' in the ground-truth purchase_properties. The financing solution chosen is 'First-Time Buyer', matching 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing. The legal package chosen is 'Premium Legal Package', matching the same under essential_legal_services. The property surveys listed include 'Full Structural Survey' and 'Specialist Survey', which match the corresponding survey options. The moving service selected is 'Standard Moving', matching the same in moving_services. The utilities options referenced are 'Basic Utilities' and an enhanced utilities option at CAD 280, which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' at CAD 280 in utility_setup.
